display.name: FluxCD — Controllers
display.description: FluxCD controller health: reconciliation throughput, errors, duration, workqueues, runtime resources, and Kubernetes API traffic.

display.name: k8s_cluster_name
display.description: Kubernetes cluster

display.name: kind
display.description: Flux resource kind (reconciliation panels)

display.name: k8s_namespace
display.description: Namespace where Flux controllers run

display.name: K8s API Request Rate by Status Code
display.description: API request rate split by status code.

display.name: K8s API Error Rate (non-2xx)
display.description: Non-2xx API response rate split by status code.

filter.expression: k8s.namespace.name = $k8s_namespace AND k8s.cluster.name IN $k8s_cluster_name AND code NOT LIKE '2%'

display.name: K8s API Request Rate by Host
display.description: API request rate split by host.

display.name: K8s API Request Rate by Method
display.description: API request rate split by HTTP method.

display.name: Avg Reconcile Duration by Kind
display.description: Mean reconciliation duration per kind (rate of sum / rate of count).

display.name: Controller Reconcile Time p99 by Controller
display.description: controller-runtime reconcile time p99 per controller.

display.name: Reconcile Duration p99 by Kind
display.description: p99 reconciliation duration per Flux kind.

display.name: Reconcile Duration p50 / p95 / p99
display.description: Reconciliation duration percentiles across all resources.

display.name: Reconcile Duration p99 by Resource
display.description: p99 reconciliation duration per Flux object. Surfaces slow individual resources.

display.name: Reconciliation Rate by Controller
display.description: Reconcile rate split by controller.

display.name: Reconcile Error Rate by Controller
display.description: Reconcile error rate split by controller.

display.name: Reconciliation Rate by Result
display.description: Reconcile rate split by result (success / error / requeue).

display.name: CPU Usage by Controller
display.description: CPU cores per controller (rate of process CPU seconds).

display.name: Goroutines by Controller
display.description: Goroutine count per controller.

display.name: Memory (Working Set) by Controller
display.description: Container working-set memory per controller.

display.name: Workqueue Add Rate by Controller
display.description: Workqueue add rate per workqueue.

display.name: Workqueue Depth by Controller
display.description: Queue depth per workqueue.

display.name: Workqueue Queue Duration p99
display.description: p99 time items wait in queue before processing.

display.name: Workqueue Retry Rate by Controller
display.description: Workqueue retry rate per workqueue. Sustained retries signal reconciliation churn.

display.name: Workqueue Unfinished Work Seconds
display.description: In-progress work age. Growing values signal stuck processors.

display.name: Reconciliations by Flux Kind
display.description: Reconcile rate per Flux resource kind.

display.name: Active Workers
display.description: Reconcile workers currently busy.

display.name: K8s API Reqs / sec
display.description: Kubernetes API request rate from Flux.

display.name: Reconcile Errors (range)
display.description: Total reconciliation errors over the selected range.

display.name: Reconcile Duration p99
display.description: p99 reconciliation duration.

display.name: Reconciliations / sec
display.description: Reconciliation rate across all Flux controllers.

display.name: Workqueue Depth
display.description: Items currently queued across controllers.
